title: Funding Maturity Profile — Principal Maturing by Month
notes: Replaces the dropped Cash Drag chart (efficiency slot). Principal of the 24 active lender facilities by repayment month, from one_offs/build_funding_maturity.py via the lender schedule. Near-term wall Apr–Oct 2026 (Jun and Aug are the rollover peaks); a EUR ~92K facility tails into 2027 (not shown). Blended replacement rate ~9.1%.
